calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: David Davenport.
Petitioner: Earnest James Newport, Jr. AKA Kryztofer Cherche Abledsoul AKA Kryztofer Cherche Abledsoul-Novotnaj, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Kryijztoff Cherche-Johan Novotnaj.
Decree signed in open court.
